ownership_constraints.task_goal: Make App session recovery consume only validated Harbor public session facts and restore exactly once after Harbor reports the stored session missing.
non_goals: reading or saving credentials, cookies, tokens, verification codes, profile storage, or raw evidence
submit, publish, send, or other external write
ownership_constraints.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; node scripts/smoke-session-restart.mjs; npm run smoke; git diff --check; loom fact-chain --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite validate --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item APP-236 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item APP-236 --json
ownership_constraints.output_format: Controller records the exact branch/head, changed paths, validation results, PR binding, and remaining live-E2E requirement.
ownership_constraints.integration_target: No PR until the separate Loom metadata-only repair is merged and this APP-236 carrier validates at the current head.

ownership_contract.task_goal: Make App session recovery consume only validated Harbor public session facts and restore exactly once after Harbor reports the stored session missing.
non_goals: authentication inference or generic identity mutation
credentials, cookies, tokens, verification codes, profile storage, or raw evidence
ownership_contract.validation_expectation: npm run typecheck; node scripts/smoke-session-restart.mjs; npm run smoke; git diff --check; Loom fact-chain and suite validation.
ownership_contract.integration_target: Loom metadata-only repair, then controller-owned PR/review and packaged App E2E.

integration_evidence.summary: The renderer rejects fixture/demo markers in runtime page titles, fact values, and both unavailable messages; requires exactly equal unavailable messages; recreates a cached session only after the exact retryable session-missing or session-lost HTTP 404 response; and lets a delayed matching 404 join the original concurrent recovery.

Only session hydration receives the parsed error body needed to validate a 404 session-missing response; transport, authorization, server, malformed, fixture, and incomplete lookup responses remain fail closed and do not start a Harbor session.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: APP-236 changes a narrow App consumer and security boundary. Its required coverage is the item-specific specification, plan, implementation contract, evidence map, focused typecheck and smoke; it does not introduce a runtime server or operate a production page.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: The suite proves the local App intent boundary only. It cannot prove a real login synchronization until Harbor #241 is merged and packaged App E2E reads the returned public identity state.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Before each PR metadata or head change and after the Harbor endpoint contract changes.
